title: The Space Between Worlds (The Space Between Worlds, #1)
author: Micaiah Johnson
targetAudience: Young adults and adult readers interested in speculative fiction and science fiction themes
relatedBooks: The Invisible Life of Addie LaRue by V.E. Schwab
The Long Way to a Small, Angry Planet by Becky Chambers
keyInsights: Explores the implications of identity across parallel worlds
Challenges the concept of privilege and social structures
Highlights the importance of personal connections and relationships
